🔍 The Problem

⚠️ Common Symptoms:

  • Blocked

🔧 How to Fix Indesit 07 - Step by Step

1

Step 1: Clean

Clean. For Indesit Dishwasher, this is a common troubleshooting step. Follow manufacturer guidelines and ensure proper safety precautions.

!

Safety First

Always disconnect power before working on any appliance. If you're unsure, consult a professional technician.
